vehicle_information.key_type: Mechanical ignition key / remote configuration varies
vehicle_information.notes: Transponder family is verified by Transpondery for Mondeo 1995-2001. Blade and UK remote frequency remain unresolved because the checked Silca proximity/remote catalogue starts at the 2001 Mondeo application.

programming.add_key: Use the supported Ford PATS OBD menu where available; transponder cloning is an alternative on compatible legacy chips.
programming.all_keys_lost: Use the legacy Ford PATS security-access route. Some early systems may require chip/module work when OBD coverage is unavailable.
programming.route: Legacy Ford PATS by OBD, with clone or module/chip fallback where required.
programming.verification_note: Confirm exact year, ignition type, module generation and current tool menu before programming. Record-specific verified information takes priority over this baseline.

vehicle_information.notes: Blade and 433 MHz application are confirmed by Silca for Mondeo B4Y/B5Y/BWY 2001-2006; Transpondery confirms 4D60 for Mondeo 2001-2007. Tool compatibility remains pending.

programming.add_key: Program through the BCM/IPC PATS using a supported Ford immobiliser OBD menu. Keep an existing key available when adding.
programming.all_keys_lost: AKL is normally completed through the BCM/IPC PATS by OBD. Timed security access or an erase-and-program sequence may apply.
programming.route: Standard OBD Ford PATS programming through the BCM/IPC PATS; use regulated battery support.
programming.online_requirement: Normally no for supported aftermarket-tool programming.
